todos.content: Fix token dropdown: wallet tokens with balance not showing — activeWalletTokenMap misses tokens because chainWalletTokens scan is async and slow. Show wallet tokens at top as a separate section.
Add security badges + all flags to token select dropdown (not just batch list)
